description: Precision timing and fashionable style make a wonderful combination in this watch from esprit. This range of watches perfectly capture the ESPRIT eye for perfection and are great for urban wear - transitioning perfectly from day to night. Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 9 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: Two YearsStainless steel case with fixed bezelStainless steel strap with butterfly claspWhite dial with silver hands and green hour marksDate aperture on the 3 hour markLogo on the dialScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant
